name: usenix-security-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for USENIX Security Symposium submissions: venue fit, HotCRP cycle submission, shepherding and author interaction, camera-ready, two-phase artifact evaluation, Open Science compliance, appendix strategy, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and the two-cycle workflow. Grounded in USENIX Security '26/'27 pages checked on 2026-07-08.
